tactics.stateBefore:
k : ℝ
u : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ
h_initial : ∃ u₀, ∀ (r : ℝ), u 0 r = u₀ r
h_homogeneous : 0 < k
h_insulated : ∃ R, 0 < R ∧ ∀ (t : ℝ), deriv (fun r => u t r) R = 0
h_eq :
  ∀ ⦃t r : ℝ⦄,
    0 < r →
      deriv (fun t => u t r) t =
        k * (deriv (fun r => deriv (fun r' => u t r') r) r + 2 / r * deriv (fun r' => u t r') r)
⊢ ∀ ⦃t r : ℝ⦄,
    0 < r →
      deriv (fun t => u t r) t =
        k * (deriv (fun r => deriv (fun r' => u t r') r) r + 2 / r * deriv (fun r' => u t r') r)

a b : ℝ
y : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ
⊢ ∀ (t x : ℝ),
    deriv (fun t0 => deriv (fun t1 => y t1 x) t0) t =
      a ^ 2 * deriv (fun x0 => deriv (fun x1 => y t x1) x0) x - b * deriv (fun t0 => y t0 x) t

F : ℝ → ℝ
u : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ
h_def : ∀ (x t : ℝ), 0 < t → u x t = F (x / √t)
hF_inj_pos : ∀ (a b : ℝ), 0 < a → 0 < b → F a = F b → a = b
x1 x2 t1 t2 θ : ℝ
hx1 : 0 < x1
hx2 : 0 < x2
ht1 : 0 < t1
ht2 : 0 < t2
heq1 : u x1 t1 = θ
heq2 : u x2 t2 = θ
⊢ t1 / t2 = (x1 / x2) ^ 2

k radius : ℝ
u : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ
hk : k = 0.15
hR : radius = 20
h_initial : ∀ (r : ℝ), 0 ≤ r ∧ r ≤ radius → u 0 r = 100
h_boundary : ∀ (t : ℝ), 0 ≤ t → u t radius = 0
h_heat :
  ∀ ⦃t r : ℝ⦄,
    0 < r ∧ r < radius →
      deriv (fun t => u t r) t =
        k * (deriv (fun r => deriv (fun r' => u t r') r) r + 2 / r * deriv (fun r' => u t r') r)
⊢ True

c : ℝ
hc : 0 < c
α : ℕ → ℝ
hα : ∀ (n : ℕ), tan (α n * c) = α n * c
⊢ orthogonalOn (fun n r => sin (α n * r)) 0 c

⊢ ∃ u,
    ContinuousOn u (closure Ω) ∧
      HarmonicOn u (interior Ω) ∧
        (∀ p ∈ left ∩ Ω, u p = 0) ∧
          (∀ p ∈ right ∩ Ω, u p = 0) ∧ (∀ p ∈ bottom ∩ Ω, u p = 0) ∧ (∀ p ∈ top ∩ Ω, u p = 100) ∧ u (1 / 2, 1 / 2) = 25

⊢ ∃ u,
    ContinuousOn u (closure Ω) ∧
      (∀ p ∈ interior Ω, True) ∧
        (∀ p ∈ left ∩ Ω, u p = 0) ∧
          (∀ p ∈ bottom ∩ Ω, u p = 0) ∧
            (∀ p ∈ right ∩ Ω, u p = 100) ∧ (∀ p ∈ top ∩ Ω, u p = 100) ∧ u (1 / 2, 1 / 2) = 25
⊢ ∀ n ≥ 1, ∀ (x : ℝ), deriv (fun x => P (n + 1) x) x - deriv (fun x => P (n - 1) x) x = (2 * ↑n + 1) * P n x
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), FS x = ↑(sawtooth x)

a b : ℝ
f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : ContinuousOn f (Set.Icc a b)
⊢ ∀ (ε : ℝ), 0 < ε → ∃ P, ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, |f x - Polynomial.eval x P| < ε

T : ℝ
hT : 0 < T
f : ℝ → ℝ
h_periodic : Function.Periodic f T
hC1 : ContDiff ℝ 1 f
h_mean : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0 ..T, f t = 0
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0 ..T, |f t| ^ 2 ≤ T ^ 2 / (4 * π ^ 2) * ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0 ..T, |deriv f t| ^ 2
⊢ Tendsto (fun r => ∫ (x : ℝ) in 0 ..r, sin x / x) atTop (𝓝 (π / 2))

f : ℝ → ℂ
k : ℕ
h_periodic : Function.Periodic f (2 * π)
h_Ck : ContDiff ℝ (↑k) f
⊢ Tendsto (fun n => ↑n ^ k * steinFourierCoeff f n) cofinite (𝓝 0)

f : ℝ → ℂ
hf_c1 : ContDiff ℝ 1 f
hf_periodic : Function.Periodic f (2 * π)
⊢ Summable fun n => ‖myFourierCoeff f n‖

f : ℝ → ℂ
hC2 : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
h_int_HOf : Integrable (fun x => steinHO f x * star (f x)) volume
h_int_ff : Integrable (fun x => f x * star (f x)) volume
⊢ (steinInner (steinHO f) f).re ≥ (steinInner f f).re

N : ℕ
a : Fin N → ℂ
⊢ let P := fun x => ∑ i : Fin N, a i * Complex.exp (2 * ↑π * Complex.I * ↑↑i * ↑x);
  ∫ (x : ℝ) in 0 ..1, ‖P x‖ ^ 2 = 1 / ↑N * ∑ j : Fin N, ‖P (↑↑j / ↑N)‖ ^ 2

N : ℕ
a b : ℕ → ℝ
F : ℕ → ℝ → ℂ
h_nonempty : ∀ {n : ℕ}, 1 ≤ n → n ≤ N → a n < b n
h_ordered : ∀ {n m : ℕ}, 1 ≤ n → n ≤ N → 1 ≤ m → m ≤ N → n < m → b n ≤ a m
h_norm : ∀ {n : ℕ}, 1 ≤ n → n ≤ N → ∫ (s : ℝ) in Set.Icc (a n) (b n), ‖F n s‖ ^ 2 = 1
⊢ ∀ {n m : ℕ},
    1 ≤ n → n ≤ N → 1 ≤ m → m ≤ N → ∫ (x : ℝ), kammler_f a b F n x * star (kammler_f a b F m x) = if n = m then 1 else 0

F Y : ℝ → ℂ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
⊢ let fourier_full := fun F x => ∫ (s : ℝ), F s * Complex.exp (2 * ↑π * Complex.I * ↑s * ↑x);
  let fourier_on := fun F a b x => ∫ (s : ℝ) in a..b, F s * Complex.exp (2 * ↑π * Complex.I * ↑s * ↑x);
  ∫ (x : ℝ), ‖fourier_full F x - fourier_on Y a b x‖ ^ 2 =
    ∫ (x : ℝ), ‖fourier_full F x‖ ^ 2 - ∫ (s : ℝ) in a..b, ‖F s‖ ^ 2 + ∫ (s : ℝ) in a..b, ‖F s - Y s‖ ^ 2

α : ℝ
hα : 0 < α
⊢ (kammlerFourier (kammlerUPow α 1) = fun s => (↑α + 2 * ↑π * Complex.I * ↑s)⁻¹) ∧
    ∀ (n : ℕ), kammlerFourier (kammlerUPow α (n + 1)) = fun s => ((↑α + 2 * ↑π * Complex.I * ↑s) ^ (n + 1))⁻¹

α : ℝ
hα : 0 < α
⊢ ∀ (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ), kammlerUPow_kammler23 α (n + 1) x = ↑x ^ n * ↑(rexp (-α * x)) * ↑(heaviside_kammler23 x) / ↑n !

N : ℕ
hN : 2 ≤ N
⊢ (∀ (s : ℝ), Fhat_kammler24 N s = 1 / ↑N * (1 + Complex.exp (-2 * ↑π * Complex.I * (↑s / ↑↑N))) ^ (N - 1)) ∧
    ∀ (k : ℤ), Ghat_kammler24 N k = 1 / ↑N * (1 + Complex.exp (-2 * ↑π * Complex.I * (↑↑k / ↑↑N))) ^ (N - 1)

N : ℕ
hN : 2 ≤ N
⊢ ∑ n ∈ Finset.range N, ↑((N - 1).choose n) ^ 2 = 4 ^ (N - 1) * ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0 ..1, cos (π * s) ^ (2 * N - 2) ∧
    ∑ n ∈ Finset.range N, ↑((N - 1).choose n) ^ 2 = ↑((2 * N - 2).choose (N - 1))

N : ℕ
hN : 2 ≤ N
⊢ ∑ n ∈ Finset.range N, ↑((N - 1).choose n) ^ 2 =
    4 ^ (N - 1) / ↑N * ∑ k ∈ Finset.range N, cos (π * ↑k / ↑N) ^ (2 * N - 2)

σ : ℝ
hσ : 0 < σ
f : ℝ → ℂ
h_min :
  ∃ g₁,
    Bandlimited σ g₁ ∧
      (∀ (g : ℝ → ℂ), Bandlimited σ g → J_cont σ f g₁ ≤ J_cont σ f g) ∧
        ∃ g₂, Bandlimited σ g₂ ∧ ∀ (g : ℝ → ℂ), Bandlimited σ g → J_disc σ f g₂ ≤ J_disc σ f g
⊢ ∃ g₁,
    Bandlimited σ g₁ ∧
      (∀ (g : ℝ → ℂ), Bandlimited σ g → J_cont σ f g₁ ≤ J_cont σ f g) ∧
        ∃ g₂, Bandlimited σ g₂ ∧ ∀ (g : ℝ → ℂ), Bandlimited σ g → J_disc σ f g₂ ≤ J_disc σ f g

ψ : ℝ → ℝ
h0 : ∀ (x : ℝ), 0 ≤ x ∧ x < 1 / 2 → ψ x = 1
h1 : ∀ (x : ℝ), 1 / 2 ≤ x ∧ x < 1 → ψ x = -1
hout : ∀ (x : ℝ), x < 0 ∨ 1 ≤ x → ψ x = 0
Fourier : (ℝ → ℝ) → ℝ → ℂ
sinc : ℝ → ℝ
⊢ Fourier ψ = fun s => haarPsi s sinc

sinc : ℝ → ℝ
⊢ (∫ (s : ℝ), if 0 ≤ s then ‖haarPsi s sinc‖ ^ 2 else 0) = 1 / 2

f : ℝ → ℝ
h_nonneg : ∀ (x : ℝ), 0 ≤ f x
h_prob : ∫ (x : ℝ), f x = 1
mesa : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ → ℝ → ℝ
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε ∧ ε ≤ 1
h_mesa_bounds : ∀ (x a b ε : ℝ), 0 ≤ mesa x a b ε ∧ mesa x a b ε ≤ 1
h_mesa_tendsto : ∀ (x : ℝ), Tendsto (fun k => mesa x (-↑k) (↑k) ε) atTop (𝓝 1)
⊢ weakConverges_kammler27 (Mkf_kammler27 mesa ε f) f
